Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-60002 affecting package openssh for versions less than 9.8p1-9
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-60002 affecting package openssh for versions less than 9.8p1-9. A patched version of the package is available.

Criterion.Comment: Package openssh is earlier than 9.8p1-9, affected by CVE-2026-60002
